section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's hemoglobin a1c will be ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future order (management step), not an existing lab result or exam finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has high blood pressure, diabetes, swelling, and left hand pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are listed as problems/symptoms without diagnostic interpretation; they largely restate reported conditions and complaints rather than providing a synthesized diagnostic impression.
